title: Standardized proof envelope with MIME content-type for HTTP transport

artifacts.description: Add §Wire-Format section defining application/bolyra-proof+json schema, versioning rules, and Content-Type negotiation semantics
TypeScript ProofEnvelope type, serializeEnvelope(), deserializeEnvelope(), and validateEnvelope() with Zod schema; exports CONTENT_TYPE constant
Python dataclass ProofEnvelope with to_json()/from_json() and pydantic validation; mirrors TS schema exactly
Re-export envelope types and helpers from public API surface
Unit tests: round-trip serialization, unknown-version rejection, missing-field errors, interop fixture against Python golden JSON
Pytest: round-trip, validation errors, parse of TS-generated golden fixture to prove cross-SDK compatibility
Integration guide showing Express middleware, FastAPI dependency, and MCP tool wrapper consuming Content-Type: application/bolyra-proof+json

steps: Define canonical JSON schema for ProofEnvelope: {version: string, circuit: string, publicSignals: string[], proof: {pi_a, pi_b, pi_c, protocol}, metadata: {prover: string, timestamp: string (ISO 8601)}}; assign MIME type application/bolyra-proof+json and register version '1.0'

Update spec/draft-bolyra-mutual-zkp-auth-01.md §Wire-Format: add schema table, Content-Type header requirements, version negotiation rules (reject unknown major versions), and normative MUST/SHOULD language

Implement sdk/src/envelope.ts: define ProofEnvelope interface, Zod validation schema, serializeEnvelope() → JSON string, deserializeEnvelope(raw: string) → ProofEnvelope (throws on validation failure), and exported CONTENT_TYPE = 'application/bolyra-proof+json'

Wire envelope into existing SDK proof outputs: update proveHandshake() and createAgentCredential() to return wrapped ProofEnvelope instead of raw snarkjs output; add envelopeFromSnarkjsProof() adapter for backward compat
Implement sdk-python/bolyra/envelope.py: ProofEnvelope dataclass with ProofMetadata and ProofData nested types, pydantic v2 model for validation, to_json()/from_json() methods, CONTENT_TYPE constant
Write cross-SDK interop fixture: generate a signed envelope in TS tests, commit the JSON to sdk/test/fixtures/envelope_v1.json, then parse it in Python tests to prove wire compatibility
Write sdk/test/envelope.test.ts: valid round-trip, unknown version rejection, missing required field errors, proof field type errors, Content-Type constant value
Write sdk-python/tests/test_envelope.py: mirror test cases plus parse of TS-generated fixture file
Add Express middleware snippet and FastAPI Depends() example to docs/proof-envelope.md showing Content-Type header inspection and deserializeEnvelope() / from_json() dispatch
Run npm run build in sdk/ and pytest in sdk-python/ to verify no regressions; update sdk/QUICKSTART.md with envelope usage example
